name: QA 514
description:
PCP QA Test No. 514



pmie - lots of expressions, checking pmie -d output and %v binding

- see also QA 520



Copyright (c) 2012 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py centos6-container reproduce
